{{CargoRelic
|name=Joyful Watercolor
|class_id=20483
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The watercolor painting drawn by children. It may look messy, but the bright colors and the laughter of the jolly characters tell how happy they were as they drew!
|fame=32
|art=15
|fth=15
|civ=14
|tech=14
|ss1=Per partner you have, Snail HP +10<br>Per partner you have, Snail DEF +1<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Per partner you have, Snail HP +20<br>Per partner you have, Snail DEF +2<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Per partner you have, Snail HP +30<br>Per partner you have, Snail DEF +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Per partner you have, Snail HP +30<br>Per partner you have, Snail DEF +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Per partner you have, Snail HP +30<br>Per partner you have, Snail DEF +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
